mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce discount rates for future equity cash flows, directly increasing present value estimates and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window or forward returns are not significantly positive during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rates exceeding 4.5 percent signal deteriorating labor market conditions that compress corporate profit margins and consumer spending, generating negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in over 65 percent of triggered instances or t-statistic for return difference is less than 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based demand growth that sustains corporate earnings trajectories, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample regression or quarterly forward returns turn negative when both series rise.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp month-over-month increases in industrial production index values reflect accelerating manufacturing output that triggers short-term momentum buying and positive equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no positive correlation with industrial production momentum or Rank IC remains below 0.01 across all tested windows.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index values surpassing 220 indicate entrenched inflation that forces central banks to maintain restrictive policy, increasing borrowing costs and depressing equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in over 70 percent of high-inflation observations or inflation threshold fails to predict return direction with p-value below 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls combined with declining unemployment rates demonstrate a strengthening labor market that boosts consumer confidence and corporate revenue forecasts, driving positive returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative forward returns in majority of cases or interaction effect vanishes in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Higher housing starts signal increased construction activity and consumer willingness to take on long-term debt, which translates into immediate positive sentiment and short-term equity gains over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show zero or negative correlation with housing starts or predictive accuracy drops below 52 percent in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below 95 while federal funds rates exceed 2.0 percent creates a supply-demand mismatch that raises recession probabilities and triggers negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in over 60 percent of triggered instances or the dual-threshold condition fails to separate bull and bear markets statistically.
